compiled_state.title: Add preconditions_summary field to ticket-reducer output with legacy 'pre-manifest' placeholder
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Story
0263-62ba — Migrate 4 consumers to PRECONDITIONS, add compaction on epic-closure with ordering contract

## Objective
Update the ticket-reducer Python package to include a `preconditions_summary` field in the compiled ticket state. When a ticket has zero PRECONDITIONS event files, the field is `{"status": "pre-manifest"}`. When events exist, it returns the latest resolved payload. This field is emitted by both ticket-show.sh and ticket-list.sh (they both call the reducer).

## Files to Modify
- `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/` (Python package) — add PRECONDITIONS event reader
- Key file: likely `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/_api.py` or `reduce_ticket` function

## Implementation Notes
1. In `reduce_ticket(ticket_dir)`: after assembling ticket state, scan ticket_dir for `*-PRECONDITIONS*.json` files
2. Sort by filename (lexicographic = chronological); apply LWW across composite keys per Story 1 contract
3. Handle snapshot format: if `*-PRECONDITIONS-SNAPSHOT.json` present, use it directly (no LWW merge needed — already merged)
4. If zero PRECONDITIONS files found: set `preconditions_summary = {"status": "pre-manifest"}`
5. If files found: set `preconditions_summary = <merged_payload>` with `{"status": "present", ...payload fields}`
6. Log-once per (consumer, ticket) for zero-events: use Python `warnings.warn()` or a module-level seen-set to avoid log spam

## Legacy-ticket graceful-degrade contract
- Zero PRECONDITIONS events → `{"status": "pre-manifest"}` — never raise, never synthesize fake events
- Corrupt/malformed PRECONDITIONS file → log warning to stderr, skip that file, continue with remaining
- Unknown schema_version → treat as minimal tier, emit one-time warning

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test_ticket_list_preconditions_summary_field passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-list.sh test_ticket_list_preconditions_summary_field
- [ ] test_ticket_show_preconditions_summary_legacy_placeholder passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-show.sh test_ticket_show_preconditions_summary_legacy_placeholder
- [ ] `preconditions_summary` field appears in ticket-show output for a ticket with events
  Verify: echo '{}' | python3 -c "import sys,os; os.chdir('$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)'); sys.path.insert(0,'plugins/dso/scripts'); from ticket_reducer import reduce_ticket; help(reduce_ticket)" 2>&1 | head -5
- [ ] Legacy ticket produces `{"status": "pre-manifest"}` not null or missing field
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-show.sh test_ticket_show_preconditions_summary_legacy_placeholder
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py
- [ ] All pre-existing ticket-list and ticket-show tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-list.sh 2>&1 | grep -E "FAIL" | grep -v "preconditions_summary" | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately

comments.body:
AC amendment: Retired event file exclusion — The Python reducer's PRECONDITIONS scan must exclude files matching the '*-PRECONDITIONS*.retired' pattern (files renamed by _compact_preconditions() to mark them retired). Add acceptance criterion:
- [ ] Retired PRECONDITIONS events (.retired suffix) excluded from preconditions_summary computation
  Verify: Create a temp ticket dir with 1 live event and 1 '.retired' event; run ticket-show.sh; assert preconditions_summary reflects only 1 event (not 2)
comments.author: Test
